# environment

> Long-form documentation for every DIFY_* env var

ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES

  DIFY_CONFIG_DIR
      Override the config-dir resolution (precedes XDG_CONFIG_HOME on Linux).

  DIFY_FORMAT
      Default output format for list commands (table | json | yaml | wide | name).

  DIFY_HOST
      Default Dify host (overridden by --host).

  DIFY_LIMIT
      Default page size for list commands (1..200).

  DIFY_NO_PROGRESS
      Suppress progress spinners. Truthy values: 1, true, yes.

  DIFY_PLAIN
      Disable ANSI colors and decorative output. Truthy values: 1, true, yes.

  DIFY_TOKEN
      Bearer token for non-interactive auth.
      (treat as secret; never echoed)

  DIFY_WORKSPACE_ID
      Workspace ID used when no --workspace flag is set.
